debug_info.goal:
C : Set (Fin 3 → ℝ)
hC : Convex ℝ C
x y : Fin 2 → Fin 3 → ℝ
z : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) → Fin 3 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i j : Fin 2) (s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)), x i + y j + z s ∈ C ↔ (i, j) ∈ s
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
by
  let s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (1, 1)}
  have h00 : x 0 + y 0 + z s ∈ C := (hxy 0 0 s).2 (by simp [s])
  have h11 : x 1 + y 1 + z s ∈ C := (hxy 1 1 s).2 (by simp [s])
  have h01 : x 0 + y 1 + z s ∉ C := (hxy 0 1 s).not.2 (by simp [s])
  have h10 : x 1 + y 0 + z s ∉ C := (hxy 1 0 s).not.2 (by simp [s])
  have h_mid : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 0 + y 0 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 1 + y 1 + z s) =
                (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 0 + y 1 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 1 + y 0 + z s) := by
    simp [smul_add, add_add_add_comm]
  have hM : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 0 + y 0 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (x 1 + y 1 + z s) ∈ C :=
    hC h00 h11 (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  rw [h_mid] at hM
  let s' : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 1), (1, 0)}
  have h01' : x 0 + y 1 + z s' ∈ C := (hxy 0 1 s').2 (by simp [s'])
  have h10' : x 1 + y 0 + z s' ∈ C := (hxy 1 0 s').2 (by simp [s'])
  have h00' : x 0 + y 0 + z s' ∉ C := (hxy 0 0 s').not.2 (by simp [s'])
  have h11' : x 1 + y 1 + z s' ∉ C := (hxy 1 1 s').not.2 (by simp [s'])
  exact sorry

sorry -- A parallelogram cannot be shattered by translates of a convex set
  hm ▸ h1.elim h2
